rule_description: The target trial excludes any previous treatment with a PARP inhibitor, while prior trials also exclude previous treatment with PARP inhibitors, but the focus on different cancer types and stages may lead to different patient populations. Severity: 0.6

plan.llm_instruction: Check if the patient has received previous treatment with PARP inhibitors. Return 'Yes' or 'No' only. Do not explain your answer.
